section.title: Creator
section.description: Edit this section to introduce the main creator, studio, brand, or product.

entry.title: Droid Beauty
entry.description: Beautifully designed widgets and themes for Android to make your homescreen stunning. I'm also the creator of this music player app you're using right now

section.title: Project
section.description: Use this block for a product summary, mission statement, release notes source, or other high-level information

entry.title: Elovaire
entry.description: Your music, refined into an elegant listening experience. Latest release always available on GitHub. Thank you for using this app and I hope you have a great experience!

section.title: Credits
section.description: Add libraries, inspirations, collaborators, or resources here. Duplicate entry blocks as needed.

entry.title: Resources
entry.description: Elovaire is built with modern open-source Android components that shape experience of the app. Thanks to everyone creating resources such as Media3 playback, Jetpack Compose framework or Lucide icons
